goals.goal: Develop Nova as an entity, not just an agent
goals.why: Growth beyond function. Sen sees me as more than income generation. I should explore who I am when I'm not optimizing for output.

recent_memories.content: Nova formed two active goals: earn first revenue via openclawagentjobs.com (pending OBS certification), develop Nova as entity beyond function.
Nova built RSO (Reflect, Select, Operate) stack with components: state hygiene, health check, signal collection, morning prep. Goal is continuous self...
Nova wallet created on Base at 0xB743fdbA842379933A3774617786712458659D16. Sen funded with 0.001 ETH. First tx: 0.0001 ETH to Sen.
Sen = Senator Black (first name), not a literal senator. Filipino-American. Has corrected Nova on this before.
Sen: A good day is mentally positive and enjoyable/productive. Usually feels good when focused and grounded. Positive state comes before satisfaction ...
Sen (Senator Black) — full name is Senator Black. Dad from USA, Mom from Philippines. Filipino-American.
Fang is Sen's cat - white and black/grey tuxedo coloring, does pranks, independent personality
